 "cells": [
  {
   "metadata": {},
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "source": "# Tutorial 13 - add_power",
   "id": "3227661c7ad98a63"
  },
  {
   "metadata": {},
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "source": "## Step 0: Setup the project and prepare the data",
   "id": "55bbc37fc6a453b4"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "initial_id",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": true,
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:17.805661200Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:17.286949300Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "import pydpeet as eet"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 1
  },
  {
   "metadata": {},
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "source": "We will use \"ERROR\" as the logging style for better readability of the notebook",
   "id": "c44394f08aac949e"
  },
  {
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:17.824546800Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:17.814925100Z"
    }
   },
   "cell_type": "code",
   "source": "eet.set_logging_style(\"ERROR\")",
   "id": "9edef9d707e9392f",
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 2
  },
  {
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:22.924328100Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:17.825735400Z"
    }
   },
   "cell_type": "code",
   "source": [
    "standardized_data = eet.read(\n",
    "    input_path=str(Path.cwd().parent.parent / \"res\" / \"raw_data_from_cyclers\" / \"Cal_Ageing_Checkup1.xlsx\"),\n",
    "    config=eet.ReadConfig.Neware_8_0_0_516,\n",
    ")"
   ],
   "id": "f07e60bdeabfbc23",
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 3
  },
  {
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:22.945532800Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:22.934727900Z"
    }
   },
   "cell_type": "code",
   "source": "eet.BatteryConfig.DEFAULT",
   "id": "9186effcd32669ee",
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "_BatteryConfigClass(cell_name='Default', c_ref=None, soc_start=0, max_voltage=4.2, min_voltage=2.5, threshold_current=0.075, voltage_intervall=0.01, minimal_current_for_capacity=-1.2, maximal_current_for_capacity=-0.8, min_current_diff=1, max_time_diff=0.5, min_voltage_diff=0, ignore_negative_resistance_values=False)"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 4,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 4
  },
  {
   "metadata": {},
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "source": "## Step 1: add_power",
   "id": "3ce5298b8a8f6a8e"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "source": [
    "df = eet.add_power(\n",
    "    df=standardized_data,\n",
    "    verbose=True,\n",
    ")"
   ],
   "id": "7670108f21833e18",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:22.963837400Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:50:22.945532800Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 5
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "source": [
    "added_cols = [c for c in df.columns if c not in standardized_data.columns]\n",
    "added_cols"
   ],
